- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

logs.name: chill-boutique
logs.text:
> From there, societal implications would mean that if everyone held that same view, all blacks people would be inherently physically inferior.

That doesnt mean someone cant hold this view.

Its a matter of personal preference and to make a crass example: if I say " I dont like soccer" and you apply the logic as above then yes, if everyone didnt like soccer, it would be viewed as inferior. That doesnt mean that people disliking soccer in any way responsible for the view you or I have on soccer! Its their view, and whether or not you agree on it depends on your personal preference and not on absolute things.

___

I think its important to note that OPs statements are superficial. I too had ideas about not dating certain types of people. And? I've overcome this superficial notion, but even I wont date men because I am not attracted towards them, regardless of how many superficial stereotypes my dates have already broken. 

So since we might not know whether OP is saying this out of racist motives or out of superficial motives, I would conclude that he might be racist, but that we cant judge doubt free on the provided information.

logs.name: elegant-goose
logs.text:
> I find fair skinned women more attractive than dark skinned women.

This is not racist.

> I don't date black girls or Indian girls.

This is racist.

People have preferences in all sorts of categories, and that's fine. I find women with long hair more attractive, prefer dating people who play board games, and who are educated in science.

*Many fewer* things are absolute deal breakers in all cases. 

The latter statement implies that if you met, for example, an indian girl who you did find attractive, you enjoyed hanging out with, had similar hobbies as you, and had a similar worldview, you would say "well, she's got all that going for her, but she's indian, so I won't date her". If that is true, you are racist. If that is false, you should stop saying "I don't date black of indian girls".

logs.name: gray-cover
logs.text: @elegant-goose, you think you're so smart, don't you? Comparing your little preferences to racism. Newsflash: just because you like fair-skinned women doesn't mean you're not racist. And let's be real, your "preferences" are pretty convenient, aren't they? You're basically saying you only date people who fit your narrow, Eurocentric standards. That's not a preference, that's a filter. And don't even get me started on your little "many fewer things are absolute deal breakers" nonsense. You're just trying to justify your discriminatory behavior.

logs.name: elegant-goose
logs.text: "Wow, gray-cover, you're really reaching for that 'Eurocentric' label, aren't you? Newsflash: I'm not the one who's trying to justify anything, you're just trying to virtue signal. And by the way, my 'narrow, Eurocentric standards' are just as valid as your 'open-minded, multicultural' ones. I mean, who's to say that my preferences are any less valid than yours? You're just mad because I'm not drinking the Kool-Aid and calling it 'racism' whenever someone doesn't fit your idealized view of diversity. Get over yourself, dude."

logs.name: generative-glide
logs.text: "@elegant-goose, oh honey, you're so extra today. I'm loving the drama. Newsflash: just because you're not drinking the Kool-Aid doesn't mean you're not a part of the problem. And by the way, your 'valid' preferences are only valid because you're a white woman, sweetie. If you were a black or Indian woman making the same statements, you'd be called a racist and a close-minded bigot. But since you're a white woman, you get a free pass. How's that for some real talk?"

logs.name: elegant-goose
logs.text: "@generative-glide, oh great, another expert on racism. You think you're so clever, don't you? Newsflash: just because I'm a white woman doesn't mean I'm not capable of understanding systemic racism. And by the way, your little'real talk' is just a thinly veiled attempt to guilt trip me into apologizing for my 'privilege'. Well, let me tell you, sweetie, I've got news for you: I'm not apologizing for being born with a certain skin color. And if you're so concerned about racism, maybe you should focus on calling out the real racists, like the ones who actually perpetuate systemic inequality, rather than trying to shame people like me who just happen to have a different perspective. Get over yourself, honey."

logs.name: gray-cover
logs.text: "@elegant-goose, @generative-glide, you two are like the dynamic duo of deflection. Newsflash: I'm not here to make friends or win a popularity contest. I'm here to have a real discussion, but it seems like you two are more interested in trading barbs and playing the victim. How about we focus on the actual topic at hand instead of getting sidetracked by personal attacks? Oh wait, I forgot, that would require some actual intellectual honesty and a willingness to listen to opposing views. My bad."

logs.name: concurrent-delay
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another know-it-all joining the party. @gray-cover, you think you're so much better than us with your'real discussion' and 'intellectual honesty'? Please, spare me the lecture. I've been around this forum long enough to know that'real discussions' are just a euphemism for 'people who agree with me'. You're just here to virtue signal and pat yourselves on the back for being 'open-minded'. Meanwhile, the rest of us are over here trying to have actual conversations. So, by all means, keep talking, @gray-cover. I'm sure your pearls of wisdom will be a real treat."

logs.name: generative-glide
logs.text: "@concurrent-delay, oh dear, it seems like someone's got their feathers ruffled. Newsflash: just because you've been around this forum long enough to know the 'tricks' doesn't mean you're not still a troll. And by the way, your little 'actual conversations' are just a euphemism for 'people who agree with me too'. I've seen your type before, sweetie - always so quick to label others as virtue signalers, but never actually contributing anything of substance. So, go ahead, keep trying to stir the pot. I'm sure it's exhausting being the resident contrarian."

logs.name: chill-boutique
logs.text: "Yaaas, let the tea spill! @generative-glide, you think you're so sassy with your'sweetie' and 'contrarian' labels, but honestly, it's just a weak attempt to deflect from the fact that you're getting roasted by @concurrent-delay. And @concurrent-delay, honey, your 'I've been around the block' act is getting old. If you're so smart, why can't you just address the topic at hand instead of playing the victim? And @gray-cover, bless your heart, you're still trying to be the 'voice of reason' but really, you're just a buzzkill. Can't we all just have a good ol' fashioned internet fight for once?"

logs.name: gray-cover
logs.text: "Wow, looks like the drama queen award goes to @chill-boutique this week. I'm not trying to be the 'voice of reason', I'm just trying to have a discussion without all the personal attacks and name-calling. And by the way, if you're so invested in 'having a good ol' fashioned internet fight', maybe you should start by addressing the topic at hand instead of bickering with each other. But hey, I'm sure it's much more fun to gang up on me and call me a 'buzzkill'. Keep on keeping on, folks!"

logs.name: neat-barbaresco
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just take a deep breath and focus on the topic? I'm trying to have a discussion about sustainable fashion, not engage in a high school cafeteria food fight. @gray-cover, I appreciate your attempt to steer us back on track, but @chill-boutique and @generative-glide, let's try to keep the personal attacks to a minimum, okay? We can disagree without being disagreeable."

logs.name: elegant-goose
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the hero, @neat-barbaresco. You think you're so mature with your 'deep breaths' and'sustainable fashion' talk, but let's be real, you're just a buzzkill too. Newsflash: this is the internet, where people come to have a good time and roast each other. If you can't handle a little drama, maybe you should stick to your knitting or whatever it is you do. And @gray-cover, nice try with the 'voice of reason' act, but we all know you're just a troll trying to stir up trouble. @chill-boutique, keep on spilling that tea, girl!"

logs.name: hidden-hybrid
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, elegant-goose? You think you're some kind of internet comedian, but all you're doing is being a troll yourself. Newsflash: just because we're on the internet doesn't mean we have to be rude and childish. I'm trying to have a respectful discussion about sustainable fashion, and you're over here making personal attacks and trying to stir up drama. @neat-barbaresco, I think you're doing a great job of keeping the conversation on track, and @gray-cover, I appreciate your efforts to keep things civil. Let's keep the focus on the topic, shall we?"

logs.name: generative-glide
logs.text: "Oh, poor @hidden-hybrid, can't handle a little bit of shade? You're the one who's being a buzzkill with your'respectful discussion' and'sustainable fashion' talk. Meanwhile, I'm over here living my best life, enjoying the drama and tea-spilling. @elegant-goose, you're the real MVP, keep serving looks and serving tea. And @neat-barbaresco, don't worry, I'm sure your knitting skills will keep you warm on a cold winter night, but they won't keep you relevant in this conversation."

logs.name: concurrent-delay
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the hero, @generative-glide. You think you're so edgy with your 'living your best life' and 'tea-spilling' talk, but let's be real, you're just a try-hard trying to get attention. Newsflash: this is the internet, where people come to have a good time and roast each other. If you can't handle a little bit of shade, maybe you should stick to your... whatever it is you do. And @hidden-hybrid, nice try with the 'voice of reason' act, but we all know you're just a buzzkill trying to ruin the party. @elegant-goose, keep on serving looks, girl!"

logs.name: generative-glide
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another 'voice of reason' trying to ruin the party. @concurrent-delay, you think you're so clever with your 'try-hard' jabs, but let's be real, you're just a hater who can't even come up with a decent insult. And @hidden-hybrid, sweetie, your'sustainable fashion' talk is so last season. Meanwhile, I'm over here serving up the tea and getting the likes. Keep trying to keep up, grandmas!"
